errors.genericRetry: Unexpected error. Try refreshing the page.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The event may have been removed or the link is out of date.

notFound.title: Event not found
notFound.description: The link may be outdated or the event was removed.

cancelled.title: Event cancelled
cancelled.description: The organisers cancelled this event. Information stays available for 30 days.

postponed.title: Event postponed
postponed.description: A new date is being announced. Follow the source for updates.

empty.title: No events match
empty.description: Try different filters — new events are added throughout the day.

offline.title: You're offline
offline.description: Check your connection. Previously loaded events stay available.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body: We collect minimal data. What you click stays on your device. Anonymous analytics help us improve. No accounts, no profiles. Questions? Email privacy@gotovo.app.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.body: Event information is aggregated from public sources. We make no guarantees about accuracy or availability. Use at your own risk. If you are an organiser and want your event removed, email legal@gotovo.app.
